infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Sneheal needs your location to deliver medicines to your exact address.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Sneheal to use the microphone for voice search.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Sneheal to use speech recognition for voice search.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Sneheal to access your photos to upload your Aadhar card.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Sneheal to use your camera to photograph your Aadhar card.
